purpose: Define the live verification plan for official JRA source candidates after the JRA inventory PR. This file is not a calendar input and does not promote JRA.

environment_status.reason: JRA pages were not reliably parseable in the current assistant web environment during the inventory step.
environment_status.required_executor: Codex or local browser DevTools if normal fetch remains unreliable

verification_targets.goal: Find the official page or route that lists JRA fixture dates for June 2026.
Find whether one official JRA meeting page exposes all race rows for a selected meeting.
Find whether every race row in one selected JRA meeting exposes race_number and race_time from official sources.
Discover the official query or path parameters needed for date, racecourse, meeting number, and race number.

checks: Open candidate official JRA pages from PR-146.
Identify fixture calendar or schedule routes.
Identify race list or racecard routes for one selected meeting.
Inspect DOM, linked scripts, and network requests only for meeting/race time verification.
Record only official source URLs and route metadata.
Do not add race-time rows until PR-148 inspection result.

expected_pr148_result_schema.source_route_type: calendar_page | racecard_page | jradb_route | network_payload | mixed | not_found

meeting.racecourse: official JRA racecourse name or null
meeting.meeting_id_or_code: official code if found, otherwise null

forward_schedule.goal: Record live verification result for one JRA meeting.
If PR-148 succeeds, create a one-meeting snapshot from verified rows.
If PR-148 fails, pause JRA and move to NAR inventory.
If PR-148 succeeds, test wider coverage before promotion.

forward_schedule.topic: JRA wider snapshot or no-promotion status
forward_schedule.goal: Create wider data only if source coverage is complete.
Promote JRA only if PR-132 rank rules are satisfied.

safety_rules: Do not promote JRA in this PR.
Do not add JRA race-time rows in this PR.
Do not infer first_race_time without source-verified rows.
Do not infer last_race_time without source-verified rows.
Do not infer race_count without a complete source-verified list.
Do not add public A-rank detail UI during this route work.
